description: Analyze learner engagement and behavioral patterns — login frequency, course interaction, time-on-task — to understand what drives completion and compliance outcomes.

transformations: compute engagement index from multiple behavioral signals
correlate engagement metrics with completion outcomes
identify leading behavioral indicators of compliance success

cce_config.uses: engagement/behavior framing — identify causal links between behavioral metrics and compliance outcomes

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer behavioral/activity metrics (logins, interactions, time-on-task); deprioritize pure outcome metrics without behavioral signal
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include whether it is a behavioral_input (engagement signal) or outcome_metric (what the behavior drives); include correlation strength with completion if available
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: use causal edges to distinguish behavioral inputs from outcomes — engagement metrics with high out_degree are behavioral drivers

penalty_rules: penalize metrics with no behavioral or engagement component (-0.15)
boost_rules: boost behavioral metrics that causally drive completion (+0.10)
boost metrics with both current_state and trend for pattern analysis (+0.08)
boost engagement metrics with high out_degree in causal graph (+0.05)
